name: @forgeax/hello-sprite-atlas
description: 2D sprite atlas + animation demo: 100 instances / 1 draw call (feat-20260521-sprite-atlas-animation M6). Baseline regen after PR #401 cullMode='none'.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle is downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: feat-20260622-chunk-gpu-instancing-sprite-tilemap M3 / D-4 / L-8: AC-01 10k sprite p95>=60 fps gate cannot be validated on the GH-hosted ubuntu metrics-validate runner — that runner falls back to swiftshader WebGL2 and fps was previously fake-green (bug-20260612 — rAF kept ticking at vsync without rendering, so run-fps measured 60.06 fps every time). With fold landed, the swiftshader software path slows progressively at 10k sprite count, so the gate would either flake or report unrealistic numbers. AC-01 p95 SSOT moved to verify-stage local sandbox run (charter P5); re-enable when a hardware-WebGPU CI runner (chrome-beta + lavapipe + --enable-unsafe-swiftshader, or self-hosted GPU runner) is wired.

bench.reason: perf-critical bench (sprite-atlas 100 instances) gated by dawn smoke drawIndexed check instead

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M6 sprite atlas + animation demo (feat-20260521)
